CONTENT.Career: On 6 December 2012, he made his debut for Genk in the UEFA Europa League against FC Basel. His league debut came on the final day of the 2012–2013 season against Club Brugge replacing the injured Benjamin De Ceulaer at half-time. He scored his first league goal at 19 October 2013 against Lierse S.K.In June 2018, it was announced Schrijvers would join Club Brugge for the 2018–19 season having agreed a four-year contract until 2022. The transfer fee paid to Genk was reported as €3 million.
CONTENT.Honours: Club BruggeBelgian Super Cup: 2018Belgian Pro League top assist provider: 2016–17
CONTENT.External links: Siebe Schrijvers at WorldFootball.netSiebe Schrijvers at SoccerwaySiebe Schrijvers at the Royal Belgian Football Association

SUMMARY: Siebe Schrijvers (born 18 July 1996) is a Belgian footballer who currently plays for Oud-Heverlee Leuven. He plays as a midfielder.
